title: lastrea flexilis
intro: Lastrea flexilis, also known as the Black-rimmed Fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of Lastrea flexilis typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional.
